attributes.action: Fix the UK potholes as it’s causing too much damage to our cars!
attributes.background: We want the government to fix the roads as me and thousands of UK road users have to pay hundreds to get tires fixed cause by uk potholes. A lot of people feel ashamed to drive in the UK all because the road conditions.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Provide funding to repair severe potholes and compensate drivers
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760312
